subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 03/26] server41tests: add a basic GET_DIR_DELEGATION test

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a basic test for directory delegation in the NFSv4 server, specifically testing the handout, recall, and return of directory delegations. The test is implemented using the existing server41tests framework and involves creating a session, opening a file, and then performing operations related to directory delegation. The patch includes new code for decoding notify events and converting bitmap4 values to integers.
